findings.evidence: `Deck.lean:190` proves `ψ⁻¹ * φ ∈ MulAction.stabilizer (Deck p) e`; Mathlib already has the needed general ingredients at `GroupAction/Defs.lean:516` (`mem_stabilizer_iff`) and `Algebra/Group/Action/Defs.lean:497` (`inv_smul_smul`).
findings.fix: Generalize it to a lemma for any `[Group G] [MulAction G α]`, e.g. `{g h : G} (hh : g • x = h • x) : h⁻¹ * g ∈ MulAction.stabilizer G x`, then use that lemma here or omit the deck-specific wrapper.
findings.issue: `div_mem_stabilizer_of_smul_eq` is not naturally deck-specific: the proof only uses `ψ⁻¹ • ψ • e = e`, `mul_smul`, and `MulAction.mem_stabilizer_iff`.

summary: One new stabilizer lemma is stated at a deck-fibre special case even though its content is a completely general group-action fact.
